user.title: Sofia Live Transport
user.description: Configure a local transport monitor. Vehicle types (comma-separated): {vehicle_types_hint}

data_description.radius: All stops within this distance from the chosen coordinates will be monitored.
data_description.time_window: Only departures within this many minutes will be shown.
data_description.refresh_interval: How often the real-time feed is polled.
data_description.vehicle_types: Allowed values: bus, tram, trolleybus, subway

error.vehicle_types: Invalid vehicle type(s). Allowed: bus, tram, trolleybus, subway.
